rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF VIRGINIA P CLAUDIO **TRANSFFERED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY**
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition To Bring The Trust Under Court Supervision
rulings.Rulings: An appearance will be required for failure to file a petition to bring the conservatee's trust under the court's supervision, despite a courtesy reminder e-mailed to counsel on 06/08/2020. *Parties and attorneys must familiarize themselves with the 5th Amended General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division which took effect on 06/17/2020 for the court's most updated pandemic-related requirements, procedures, and protocols. The petitioning party must inform all counsel, self-represented parties and all parties entitled to notice of the re-set hearing date (if applicable), the CourtCall procedure and Court Call's phone number (1-888-882-6878). **A remote appearance by telephone is strongly encouraged. Parties and attorneys may arrange for a telephonic appearance by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time. The requirement for advance permission to appear by CourtCall is suspended until further notice. A CourtCall appearance may be made by mobile phone. If counsel or any party appears in person, he or she should anticipate delays at the entrance to the courthouse and inside the courthouse. Masks must be worn at all times while in the courthouse and social distancing protocols will be strictly enforced, including inside the courtroom.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ILENE BRETHOLZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/13/20. No response to preliminary tentative ruling posted on 6/10/20. No courtesy copies. No proposed order. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.6 A., and 14.93 G.] Additionally, item 6 of the petition appears to be incorrect, if "cousins" survived. Item 8 of the petition must clearly identify the predeceased ancestors and their dates of death (decedent's parents, grandparents, other issue of grandparents who are the parents of these cousins), through whom these cousins take. [LRSF 14.26 D. and E.] Additionally, the waivers of bond attached to the petition are not the proper mandatory Judicial Council forms. (The correct forms were presumably filed separately after the petition.)
